use_cases: Toggle settings and preferences on or off in user dashboards
Enable or disable features like notifications, dark mode, or auto-save
Collect binary yes/no selections in forms and settings panels
Use as a modern alternative to checkboxes for boolean states
Control app state in settings pages and configuration interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight toggle switch component built on Radix UI primitives with accessible focus states and keyboard navigation support. Features state-based styling through Tailwind data attributes for checked/unchecked states, with built-in dark mode support via semantic color tokens. Designed as a reusable atomic component for boolean input in forms, settings, and configuration UIs.
